description: The client operates a fragmented legacy data estate with siloed systems and high technical debt.
context: The organisation operated a fragmented legacy data landscape comprising MS SQL-based data warehouses, Teradata-based data marts, and mainframe-hosted Customer Information Systems (CIS).

description: The client lacked a coordinated structure to govern AI deployments and scale use cases responsibly.
context: The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly, govern AI deployments, and scale proven use cases into production.

description: The client's legacy data estate lacked end-to-end visibility of Critical Data Elements across systems.
context: The legacy data estate lacked visibility into how Critical Data Elements (CDEs) flowed across 78+ systems and 6 functional areas, creating significant compliance risk and data quality gaps.

description: The overarching transformation programme includes the establishment and operation of the AI CoE.
context: This case study documents a comprehensive AI and Data transformation programme spanning three strategic pillars: AI Centre of Excellence

description: The transformation programme encompasses the migration and modernisation of the data platform.
context: This case study documents a comprehensive AI and Data transformation programme spanning three strategic pillars: ... Modern Data Platform

description: The CoE provides the centralised structure and governance model needed to responsibly govern and scale AI.
context: The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly... CoE Foundations (Q4 2023) ... Established GenAI CoE

description: The AI CoE was formally established and operationalised during the Q4 2023 setup event.
context: CoE Foundations (Q4 2023) ... Established GenAI CoE

description: The CoE delivers a GenAI-powered solution to automate and accelerate the drafting of complaints letters.
context: Use Case 1: Complaints Letter Writing (CRAiG) ... GenAI drafts letter, human reviews in <5 mins

description: The CoE enables automated summarisation, root cause extraction, and sentiment analysis from call transcripts.
context: Use Case 2: Call Transcript Analytics ... Automated call summarisation ... Nuanced sentiment beyond NLP/ML

description: The CoE scales call screening coverage from manual sampling to full GenAI-enabled automated screening.
context: Use Case 3: QA/QC AI Assist ... Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled

description: The CoE pilots advanced fraud detection capabilities using GenAI techniques.
context: Scaling the Pipeline - Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot

description: The CRAiG use case directly generates a ~90% reduction in the time required to draft complaints letters.
context: ~90% time savings on complaints letters ... 1,300 bespoke letters/week, 40 mins each manually

description: The QA/QC AI Assist use case achieves full automated screening coverage, replacing manual sampling.
context: Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled ... Step-change in quality assurance coverage

description: The CoE embeds responsible AI practices including threat modelling, PII redaction, and model risk evaluation.
context: Responsible AI practices embedded from inception: threat modelling, PII redaction, model risk evaluation

description: Responsible AI governance capabilities enable safe and compliant deployment of the CRAiG use case.
context: PII redaction, model monitoring, threat modelling ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024, graduated to production

description: The modern data platform is architected and deployed on the Azure cloud infrastructure.
context: Modern Data Platform - Azure, Databricks & dbt ... Migrated mainframe CIS to modern data lakehouse on Azure

description: The platform consolidates data assets and leverages Databricks for unified data analytics and engineering.
context: Azure + Databricks + dbt ... Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure

description: The platform utilises dbt for modular, reusable, version-controlled data transformation models.
context: Azure + Databricks + dbt ... Modular, reusable, version-controlled dbt models ... Rigorous DQ through testing and validation in dbt

description: The modern platform consolidates and replaces legacy Teradata Vantage data warehouse assets.
context: MS SQL & Teradata migration ... Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure

description: The platform decommissions legacy Unisys mainframe systems and migrates customer data to the cloud.
context: Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems ... Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP

description: The platform delivers customer data mastering capabilities to create a single authoritative view.
context: Customer data mastering ... Single, authoritative view of customer data across the organisation

description: The modern data platform accelerates code build and test cycles by over 30% using GenAI techniques.
context: >30% faster code development via GenAI ... >30% Reduction in code build & test ... Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value

description: The platform reduces infrastructure costs by decommissioning legacy systems and moving to cloud-native architecture.
context: Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems, significantly lowering infrastructure costs ... Freed budget for innovation and modernisation

description: The platform migrates customer data feeds and integrates with SAP systems for downstream consumption.
context: Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP ... Customer data feeds migrated from legacy CIS to SAP and Azure lakehouse

description: The CoE is characterised by a federated governance model that balances central oversight with distributed delivery.
context: Scalable AI platform with federated governance, API management and model monitoring

description: The platform leverages GitHub Copilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt code conversion and development.
context: GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt conversion

description: The accelerated migration approach is validated through a PoC on complex data mart codebases.
context: PoC on complex data mart codebase validating accelerated approach ... Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value

description: The programme includes data lineage tracing and reconciliation controls to ensure compliance and quality.
context: Data Governance - Data Lineage & Reconciliation Controls ... 205 CDEs traced end-to-end ... 78 systems mapped

description: The capability resolves the visibility gap by tracing CDEs end-to-end across 78+ systems.
context: The legacy data estate lacked visibility into how Critical Data Elements (CDEs) flowed across 78+ systems ... 205 CDEs traced end-to-end

description: The client conducts collaborative workshops and stakeholder engagements in Pune.
context: Collaborative workshops in Pune with client stakeholders

description: The fraud analysis use case was piloted and evaluated during the Feb–Sep 2024 pilot event.
context: Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024

description: The CoE delivers the ~90% reduction in letter drafting time through the CRAiG use case.
context: ~90% time savings on complaints letters ... Graduated use cases to production

description: The overall programme delivers measurable cost reductions across all three strategic pillars.
context: The programme has delivered measurable business impact across all three pillars, reducing costs, improving compliance, and building a scalable foundation for AI-driven innovation.

description: Data mastering capabilities accelerate code development and testing cycles through automated pipelines.
context: Customer data mastering ... Centralised data pipelines with built-in validation and auditing ... >30% faster code development via GenAI

description: The call transcript analytics use case leverages Azure Language AI for sensitive data redaction.
context: Sensitive data redaction via Azure Language AI ... Automated call summarisation

description: The modern data platform migration and GenAI acceleration approach were piloted during the Feb–Sep 2024 event.
context: PoC on complex data mart codebase validating accelerated approach ... Medallion Architecture Bronze milestone delivered ahead of schedule ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024
